name: BKS Bank AG
summary: BKS Bank AG, together with its subsidiaries, provides various banking products and services. The company operates through Corporate and Business Banking, Retail Banking, and Financial Markets segments. It accepts various deposits products, such as savings, sight, and time deposits; and offers working capital and project finance, lease and export finance, guarantees, and housing and real estate loans, as well as consumer loans. The company also provides advisory, payment, online banking, insurance brokerage, investment options, asset management, custodian, treasury, and international and private banking services, as well as is involved in proprietary trading activity. It operates 63 branches in Austria and internationally. BKS Bank AG was founded in 1922 and is headquartered in Klagenfurt, Austria.
